name: e2e-route-splitter
description: Static route items dispatch to deterministic route task templates and aggregate outputs.

task.task: If the Route Item Context lists Route id: frontend, reply exactly with the Item input value. Otherwise reply ROUTE_FRONTEND_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
If the Route Item Context lists Route id: backend, reply exactly with the Item input value. Otherwise reply ROUTE_BACKEND_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.

aggregate.task: If the Parallel Aggregate Context includes ROUTE_UI_TOKEN and ROUTE_API_TOKEN in output previews, reply exactly E2E_ROUTE_AGGREGATE_OK. Otherwise reply E2E_ROUTE_AGGREGATE_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
